element_introduction_order.element: Eight regular playable characters (from Fatal Fury 2 roster)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player selects first opponent; basic movesets learned
Brief invincibility window after attack lands; learned organically through play

element_introduction_order.element: Line Jump Attacks (Light Punch/Light Kick on opposite line)
Tung Fu Rue and Duck King (returning characters from original game)
element_introduction_order.first_appears: After first opponent selection, within first ten matches

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: First AI-only character encounter; skill gate

element_introduction_order.element: Geese Howard (returning character from original game)

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Final regular boss before special condition
After winning all matches in two rounds (perfect run condition)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Dream Match; ultimate mastery test and series inception point for King of Fighters

typical_relief_triggers: Return to roster after defeat of weaker characters
typical_tension_triggers: CPU boss introduction (Billy, Axel, Laurence, Krauser)
Consecutive boss matches without roster variety
Ryo Sakazaki conditional encounter (requires perfect two-round wins)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation structure: eight character selection matches establish baseline difficulty, followed by unbroken sequence of five increasingly difficult boss encounters. Special secret match adds conditional spike for perfect play.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Perfect two-round victories unlock Ryo Sakazaki secret match; hidden conditional gate
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Cross-over character (Ryo Sakazaki) appears as hidden opponent accessible only through flawless execution (two-round victories across all matches)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible baseline with eight regular characters and player-selected first opponent; combo and line jump systems introduced organically without tutorial gates
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Difficulty jump as first CPU-only boss (Billy Kane) appears after ten matches; sustained pressure through consecutive Axel, Laurence, and Geese encounters
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final boss Wolfgang Krauser before conditional secret match; Ryo Sakazaki introduces ultimate skill gate requiring two-round perfect victories across entire run
notable_spikes: Billy Kane first appearance (transition from regular roster to bosses)
Consecutive boss gauntlet (Billy → Axel → Laurence → Geese → Krauser with no relief matches)
Ryo Sakazaki conditional unlock (requires perfect execution throughout entire single-player campaign)

notable_level_patterns.description: Player chooses first opponent from eight regular characters, creating variable early-game difficulty and replayability before game-directed boss sequence
Five consecutive boss encounters (Billy, Axel, Laurence, Geese, Krauser) with no roster relief; rigid progression after initial ten matches
Ryo Sakazaki appears only after perfect two-round victories across all preceding matches; dream match serves as ultimate mastery verification and series crossover moment

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Faster Game Speed with Combo Emphasis
notable_level_patterns.description: Special edition introduces combo system and increased game speed relative to Fatal Fury 2, creating tighter windows for mastery and invincibility frames during attack chains
